task_type: derive | check | compare | summarize | translate | construct | review
declared_goal: State the bounded goal of this solver/model task.
allowed_operations: Operation the solver/model is allowed to perform.
disallowed_operations: Claims or actions the solver/model must not perform.

source_context.title: Source title
source_context.reference: URL, path, citation, or receipt reference
source_context.use_limit: How this source may be used in the task.

expected_artifact.artifact_type: derivation | proof_attempt | counterexample | summary | mapping | test_plan

claim_limit: No public claim may exceed the returned artifact and declared sources.
